channel.title: Grant on The Rematriation Project
channel.description: Recent content in Grant on The Rematriation Project

item.title: New article! "From Notes to Networks: Using Obsidian to Teach Metadata and Linked Data"
item.description:
Great news! Our team was awarded a $239,742 grant from the Laura Bush 21st (LB21) Century Librarian program run by the Institute ofMuseums and Library Services (IMLS).

This workshop will center capacity-building for integral community members invested in archival interventions with their local goals to preserve, organize, and share their knowledge and data.

More updates to come!
